item.dc:creator: pilomotor

item.title: Sometimes we are bound together and create the most beautiful friendships.
item.description: I'm a father of 3. I'm from the UK, England, west midlands. We are a small family currently having a rough year with the last couple of months being the roughest. We were suppose to receive not only our payment but our back payment from the government on the 28th of this month and has put us in a very bad situation. It's the summer holidays and I've got next to no time that isn't devoted towards the kids. Update on everything going on. The payment we were meant to receive on the 28th has now been delayed by DWP until the 17th of next month. which has put massive stress on the family with upcoming bills from August such as bills, rent, food and essentials to take care of the kids. Thank you to the people who have helped me get through this either it be with my family or just advice or just positive things. Thank you to the Pizza angels for helping me with grocery vouchers this month. I don't have enough word's to thank the people who have helped and carried my family through this apart from it means the absolute world to me. I've put a goal up to help with the thing's we need for the current month coming up. Thank you from the bottom of my heart if you take 5 minutes to read this. Getting to the finish line means everything to me and the kids. https://ko-fi.com/fatherofthreelions Update - Thank you so so much for helping me get to 37% of my goal. I have no words, thank you from the bottom of my heart for taking stress from me.
item.dc:creator: thefatherslasthope

item.title: Wordsday Thursday: Naughty nuggets (and cat tax), 12th
item.description:
1. It's Thursday, my friends! Welcome to a dumpette of grammar, language, puns, and other word related stuff. Links to previous Wordsday posts are below the cat tax.
2.
3. When I say I'm porn surfing, it means I'm on a webshop, looking at the really expensive alpaca silk yarn I know I'll never ever afford.
4.
5. How do you like them melons...
6.
7.
8. I'm gonna firkytoodle your brains out. I hope someone's porn habit will henceforth be messed up by their brain automatically replacing the word 'fuck' with 'firkytoodle'. Firkytoodle yeah!
9.
10.
11. "How can you not find it, it's right there!" [aggressive pointing]
12.
13.
14. oh
15. Me, explaining my search history: "It's for art references. Definitely. True story."
16. Cat tax. #tbt to 6 years ago. Me: "Charlie! That's my yarn box!" Ms. Charlotta: " zzzzz..... mmhmmm..... mohair is the shit..... nice goat fluff..... zzzzzzz" 11th https://imgur.com/a/dIGwHli 10th https://imgur.com/gallery/c0dDo4w 9th https://imgur.com/gallery/7cGoSqD 8th https://imgur.com/gallery/xzPXnwd 7th https://imgur.com/gallery/XGxpYOC 6th https://imgur.com/a/4MYjhxp 5th https://imgur.com/gallery/K1XHiGJ 4th https://imgur.com/gallery/Ef5IxdR 3rd https://imgur.com/gallery/nlGoqtH 2nd https://imgur.com/gallery/idZn4fD 1st https://imgur.com/gallery/WTcmUTg
item.dc:creator: Kittensandyarns

item.title: Good News-letter #7, July edition!
item.description:
Afternoon guys, gals, and non-binary pals! I’m glad to be back and sharing good news with you! Let’s get rolling!
French company finds high-yield success with new growth techniques - https://www.pv-magazine.com/2024/11/29/agrivoltaics-can-increase-grape-yield-by-up-to-60/
Researchers devise way to cheaply and effectively store sunlight to be used later as heat - https://cen.acs.org/energy/solar-power/Curved-molecule-bottles-sunlight-releases/103/web/2025/07
A twice yearly injection guards against HIV, royalty free and with six generic manufacturers already lined up - https://newatlas.com/infectious-diseases/hiv-prevention-fda-lenacapavir/
Firefighting teams from Mexico arrive to assist Texas with flood relief - https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/jul/08/mexico-firefighters-texas-flooding-search-rescue
New dental floss could mean receiving vaccines without getting a shot - https://www.science.org/content/article/engineers-transform-dental-floss-needle-free-vaccine
Liverpool football club decides to pay remaining 20 million pounds to family of player tragically killed - https://sports.yahoo.com/article/liverpool-makes-decision-20-million-165336501.html
Humpback whales move to “least concern” regarding extinction status - https://thebottomline.as.ucsb.edu/2022/10/humpback-whale-no-longer-on-the-endangered-species-list
Cannabinoids effectively combat minor and major fungal diseases - https://newatlas.com/health-wellbeing/topical-cannabinoids-antifungal-cryptococcus/
And that’s the stories for now! Thank you all for being here! I love you and there’s nothing you can do about it! Have good news that needs sharing? Message me! Want to be notified when I post these? Comment “Count me in” below! Missed last month’s issue? I THINK NOT! https://imgur.com/gallery/good-news-letter-6-june-edition-nKjJG42
item.dc:creator: rabbihimself

item.title: Man proposes to girlfriend and get's unexpected answer.
item.description: Hey everyone. Hope your week and summer holidays are going great. I'm a dad of 3 little ones, currently going through a real rough time. I'm sharing videos to raise awareness about our situation. Getting to the finish line means everything to me and the kids. Update on our situation and how thing's aren't going to great right now. https://imgur.com/gallery/lowkey-made-me-cry-love-is-beautiful-thing-8F7ag7P Enjoy the video!

item.title: Cartoon Memes Vol 2
item.description:
These are mostly Scooby Doo and Avatar memes but I didn't have enough for full dumps and I had a couple extra cartoon Memes so I'm limping them all together
I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. Hope you all enjoyed, as always I'll post the links to my previous posts by category below for anyone who's interested. Star Wars: Part 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/SVzbsKr Part 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/agPBjZY Part 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/3WbYPiO Part 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/D3xLtoh Part 5: all the doll hairs.
Every. Day.

item.title: King’s Carefully Curated Dump
item.description:
Ya’ll are the best
Threw him at ya’ll early this time
Free Bird playing
Hey got weekend plans now
I went to therapy yesterday too!!!
Mi familia well the Colombian side
I don’t live far from here
Jay Jurden, dude is hilarious
It was like 3 feet long and had a dragon head blown inside the tube
Bless her heart
Damn girl
Seriously
I hope this brightens your day a little. Text someone you haven’t heard from in a while and tell them you miss them. As always boop your pets noses/beaks/whatever for me.

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1428 (the gateway)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
The newest canonized saint in the Orthodox Church is an indigenous woman from Alaska who was the wife of a priest. Officially canonized about a month ago.
Bigfoot is Cain. Apparently. To some Mormons.
Today I'm 4.
"Tyrannosaurus rex was Probably Not racist, Paleontologists think"
If you've played it.... yeah
Goodbye trilobites.
Komodo Dragons used to have a wider range.
Oh, to be a leafy thing in the Ediacran sea and not worry about anything.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [whispered] "what the fuck?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.description: Made eye contact with Panko in the afternoon during day off. Cue the borks.
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Artist Cornelia Konrad's Site Specific Land Art is Amazing
item.description:
Always defying expectation
Often defying gravity
Giving motion to frozen objects
Chaotic Good
Structures that shouldn't exist
Above all, a sense of play
The intersection of nature and human architecture is a recurring theme
These windows in the woods are a favorite of mine
And I love this self forming passageway captured in the act of becoming
Snowball arch
I love this one so much
But honestly, I love them all, I hope you enjoyed them!
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: 6 years of food to Imgurians
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett We have a really special anniversary this weekend
It's the SIX YEAR anniversary of TheFreePizzaDude project!!!! 15,712 meals sent to Imgurians averages out to about 50 meals/week for six full years, it's amazing
When I started this in 2019 I only planned to make 1 post I had only been back on my feet from homelessness for a year and I definitely couldn't afford to continue every weekend
Then hundreds of amazing people started messaging that account Not asking for food, but asking how they could help others
So I just kept making posts every week hoping that incredible people would show up to help And 6 years later - people from all over the world are still helping
I haven't met many people you see on those posts but they've become such an important part of my life Being there for me when Mr Puckett and Nanna died, when I moved to Nashville and then Minneapolis Every time I needed a human in my life there was a Pizza Angel there to help me
So tomorrow at 2pm central isn't just a celebration of the project itself It's a celebration of how many amazing people are right here on Imgur ready to help complete strangers with anything
It's amazing to look back on 6 years personally, I feel like an entirely different person This project helped keep me sober when I was fresh on my feet, it helped me through the loss of dogs and loved ones, it gave me something to look forward to when I had absolutely nothing else
So while there are thousands of people out there who are grateful to the Pizza Angels for sending them food I'm eternally grateful to simply have them as friends.
Set an alarm for 2pm central tomorrow, Friday, and come help us celebrate all the amazing people who have helped others on this app over the last 6 years. It's going to be a special day. ... If you can't make the post but want to help someone get groceries or a meal, Pizza Angels can send the food for you! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude ... And before TheFreePizzaDude post tomorrow is the 200th edition of 20 Wholesome Things at Noon central. Time to celebrate ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Wise kitty
item.dc:creator: ManoloBIahnik

item.title: The Egg Theory --- a true tumblr classic
item.description: *** EDIT, I have just learned this was created by Andy Weir*** I was looking through my old tumblr account and found this again! I've always loved the egg theory. I haven't used my tumblr since my early twenties. so it was a real blast from the past. I really enjoyed blogging my thoughts, or things on my mind that day, art I thought others should view/appreciate, and other random snippets of my life. I basically do that now on ig, I mean. I have a huge 10% of my current followers, usually the same people, viewing my shit, most of whom I haven't spoken to in person in years. it sorta akes me feel like my thoughts are actually interesting? like can I create some sort of influence? some sort of ripple, you know? I'm very much different now. I am more invested in my life. I'm working as an emt, 5 years going going, man. ( some back story. I goot my first job being a real emt in march of 2020. I remember vividly those two weeks of orientation, vigours testing of our capabilities in learning the equipment. the stretcher, how to appropriately carry a human up and down strairs, I volunteered for that one carry my goofy ass up those fucking stairs. well, on the very last day, there were whisperings of this thing called covid. That shit ain't coming here said a paramedic. and BAM! the world was chaos!) anyways, I am currently trying to pass medic school. I post lots of memes, usually interspliced with political commentary, real world shit, and things I see- pieces of me. ... tl:dr I think I'm gonna have to resuscitate this my tumblr, my blog. ig stories are only visible for a short amount of time ;( p.s. I am currently a wee bit high, sorry for spewing this rambling postscript. okay bye.
item.dc:creator: hotdogcream

item.title: Wenclair dump #2
item.description:
1 Keidihoi Wenclair dump #1: https://imgur.com/gallery/wenclair-dump-QQPbMN8 That was exactly one year ago. Posting this before season 2 of Wednesday starts next week, because there's bound to be new sources and inspirations for fanart. I don't expect them to get together in season 2. If ever, it will probably be the series finale if anything. Speaking of season 2, I haven't watched the trailer, because trailers are spoilery AF these days. And I'm not posting Wenclair next week, as I'll be watching the show instead. Speaking of spoilers, there are a couple season 1 spoilers in here, so be warned! Most of this is clearly not canon though. Also, minor blood warning, and this post contains a small amount of snoodity! I'm listening to the season 1 soundtrack while making this post.
2 Plutopri
3 Ikimaru
4 TORT / Walnut_es
5 Kris-6758
6 Anna Marine
7 L1v_art
8 Toast with peanut butter / Urmominbike
9 mistbix
10 Tanya Lehoux
11 Kris7658
12 Emmi Hyvärinen
13 Emmi Hyvärinen
14 Kris6758
15 Kris6758
16 Miki A Art
17 Sethkiel
18 Wednesday LEGO (why minidolls tho)
19 Wednesday LEGO Brickheadz (why no minifigs)
20 Sapientgolem
21 Leodraws3
22 Vamppell Roan
23 Malcanine
24 Luckytism
25
26
27 Candel645
28 Yumeel_san
29 Knaito
30 Mellferrscott
31 Pra Ryai
32 Kris6758
33 xPsychoCookie
34 Maki Haruki
35 Vanekaiiri
36 Kulai
37 Forraquet
38 Daniel Kordek
39 Kris6758
40 bamboo_o11
41 maio_smz
42 meiflowersketches
43 DesuCoin
44 lloonahugs
45 sosomisoup
46 Kris6758
47 Kris6758
48 Livtodraw
49 Abyss.crafts & Bulletwitchcosplay
50 Abyss.crafts & Bulletwitchcosplay
51 Abyss.crafts & Bulletwitchcosplay
52 Frosty
53 GretchenRNG
54 Kris6758
So...that was odd. Instead of doing the second set of 50 posts, I did the next set of 50 images, as some posts had multiple (like the holiday ones) I went to 55 like last time, and it only got halftway through the year. So I could do another one of these sooner next time? Also, got halfway through the soundtrack. It's a little spoopier than I remember!
item.dc:creator: SuperMermaidNinja2Turbo
